root_cause_summary: The event timestamp placed the accepted event outside the invoice period being inspected.
root_cause_details: The event was accepted, but its timestamp belonged to a previous billing period, so it did not appear on the current invoice.
resolution_summary: Corrected the event timestamp and verified invoice-period attribution.
resolution_steps: Opened Event Search for the accepted event.
Compared the event timestamp with the invoice period.
Submitted a corrected event timestamp for the intended billing period.
verification_steps: Use Event Search to verify the corrected timestamp.
Verify invoice usage appears in the intended invoice period.
verification_results: Event Search showed the corrected timestamp in the intended period.
Invoice usage appeared on the intended invoice.
